MaxLineLength:CaffeineDatabase_Impl.kt:CaffeineDatabase_Impl.<no name provided>$connection.execSQL("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `caffeine_intakes` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `drinkId` INTEGER, `drinkName` TEXT NOT NULL, `caffeineMg` INTEGER NOT NULL, `volumeMl` INTEGER NOT NULL, `timestamp` INTEGER NOT NULL)")

MaxLineLength:CaffeineDatabase_Impl.kt:CaffeineDatabase_Impl.<no name provided>$connection.execSQL("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `drinks` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `caffeineMg` INTEGER NOT NULL, `volumeMl` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isDefault` INTEGER NOT NULL)")

MaxLineLength:CaffeineDatabase_Impl.kt:CaffeineDatabase_Impl.<no name provided>$connection.execSQL("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `official_drink_cache` (`barcode` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `brand` TEXT, `caffeineMgPer100ml` REAL NOT NULL, `energyKcalPer100ml` REAL, `quantity` TEXT, `fetchedAtMillis` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`barcode`))")

MaxLineLength:CaffeineDatabase_Impl.kt:CaffeineDatabase_Impl.<no name provided>$connection.execSQL("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pending_changes` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `entityType` TEXT NOT NULL, `entityId` TEXT NOT NULL, `operationType` TEXT NOT NULL, `payload` TEXT NOT NULL, `timestamp` INTEGER NOT NULL, `retryCount` INTEGER NOT NULL, `status` TEXT NOT NULL)")

SuspendFunSwallowedCancellation:CaffeineViewModel.kt:CaffeineViewModel$catch (e: Exception) { Timber.e(e, "Failed to add intake") _uiState.update { it.copy(error = context.getString(R.string.error_add_failed)) } onError() }

SuspendFunSwallowedCancellation:CaffeineViewModel.kt:CaffeineViewModel$catch (e: Exception) { Timber.e(e, "Failed to delete intake") _uiState.update { it.copy(error = context.getString(R.string.error_delete_failed)) } onError() }

SuspendFunSwallowedCancellation:CaffeineViewModel.kt:CaffeineViewModel$catch (e: Exception) { Timber.e(e, "Failed to update intake") _uiState.update { it.copy(error = context.getString(R.string.error_save_failed)) } onError() }

SuspendFunSwallowedCancellation:OfficialDrinkRepositoryImpl.kt:OfficialDrinkRepositoryImpl$catch (e: Exception) { Timber.e(e, "Failed to fetch official drinks from API") // Fallback do cache val cached = cacheDao.getAllCached() if (cached.isNotEmpty()) { Timber.d("Falling back to ${cached.size} cached drinks") Result.success(cached.map { it.toOfficialDrink() }) } else { Result.failure(e) } }

SuspendFunSwallowedCancellation:OfficialDrinkViewModel.kt:OfficialDrinkViewModel$catch (e: Exception) { Timber.e(e, "Unexpected error loading official drinks") _uiState.value = _uiState.value.copy( isLoading = false, error = context.getString(R.string.error_load_failed) ) }

SuspendFunSwallowedCancellation:OfficialDrinkViewModel.kt:OfficialDrinkViewModel$catch (e: Exception) { Timber.e(e, "Unexpected error searching official drinks") _uiState.value = _uiState.value.copy( isLoading = false, error = context.getString(R.string.error_search_failed) ) }

{ public override fun createAllTables(connection: SQLiteConnection) { connection.execSQL("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `caffeine_intakes` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `drinkId` INTEGER, `drinkName` TEXT NOT NULL, `caffeineMg` INTEGER NOT NULL, `volumeMl` INTEGER NOT NULL, `timestamp` INTEGER NOT NULL)") connection.execSQL("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `drinks` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `caffeineMg` INTEGER NOT NULL, `volumeMl` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isDefault` INTEGER NOT NULL)") connection.execSQL("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `official_drink_cache` (`barcode` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `brand` TEXT, `caffeineMgPer100ml` REAL NOT NULL, `energyKcalPer100ml` REAL, `quantity` TEXT, `fetchedAtMillis` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`barcode`))") connection.execSQL("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pending_changes` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `entityType` TEXT NOT NULL, `entityId` TEXT NOT NULL, `operationType` TEXT NOT NULL, `payload` TEXT NOT NULL, `timestamp` INTEGER NOT NULL, `retryCount` INTEGER NOT NULL, `status` TEXT NOT NULL)") connection.execSQL("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `idx_pending_entity_status` ON `pending_changes` (`entityType`, `entityId`, `status`)") connection.execSQL("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)") connection.execSQL("INSERT OR REPLACE INTO room_master_table (id,identity_hash) VALUES(42, 'ff14c327f26dde3ead0a5ae88d912875')") } public override fun dropAllTables(connection: SQLiteConnection) { connection.execSQL("DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `pending_changes`") } public override fun onCreate(connection: SQLiteConnection) { } public override fun onOpen(connection: SQLiteConnection) { VariableNaming:CaffeineIntakeDao_Impl.kt:CaffeineIntakeDao_Impl$val _sql: String = "SELECT * FROM caffeine_intakes WHERE timestamp >= ? AND timestamp < ? ORDER BY timestamp DESC"
VariableNaming:CaffeineIntakeDao_Impl.kt:CaffeineIntakeDao_Impl$val _sql: String = "SELECT COALESCE(SUM(caffeineMg), 0) FROM caffeine_intakes WHERE timestamp >= ? AND timestamp < ?"
VariableNaming:DrinkDao_Impl.kt:DrinkDao_Impl$val _sql: String = "SELECT * FROM drinks ORDER BY name ASC"
VariableNaming:OfficialDrinkCacheDao_Impl.kt:OfficialDrinkCacheDao_Impl$val _sql: String = "SELECT * FROM official_drink_cache ORDER BY name ASC"

VariableNaming:PendingChangeDao_Impl.kt:PendingChangeDao_Impl$val _sql: String = """ | | SELECT * FROM pending_changes | WHERE entityType = ? AND entityId = ? | AND status IN ('PENDING', 'SENDING') | LIMIT 1 | """.trimMargin()
VariableNaming:PendingChangeDao_Impl.kt:PendingChangeDao_Impl$val _sql: String = "SELECT * FROM pending_changes WHERE status = 'FAILED' AND retryCount < 5"
VariableNaming:PendingChangeDao_Impl.kt:PendingChangeDao_Impl$val _sql: String = "SELECT * FROM pending_changes WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY timestamp ASC LIMIT ?"
VariableNaming:PendingChangeDao_Impl.kt:PendingChangeDao_Impl$val _sql: String = "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pending_changes WHERE status = 'FAILED'"
